pipeline_health_check.description: Diagnose general operational health of the roster pipeline.

stuck_operation_diagnosis.description: Investigate why roster processing jobs are stuck.

pipeline_delay_analysis.description: Analyze stages causing slow pipeline execution.

failure_organization_analysis.description: Identify organizations responsible for the highest pipeline failure rates.

source_system_failure_analysis.description: Identify which source systems cause the most failures.
steps: Compute failure ratios by source system

root_cause_diagnosis.description: Perform a multi-dimensional root cause analysis of pipeline failures.
steps: Determine pipeline stages where failures occur

organization_deep_diagnosis.description: Investigate failures related to a specific organization.

pipeline_stage_failure_analysis.description: Analyze which pipeline stages contribute most to failures.
steps: Determine failure counts per pipeline stage

data_source_diagnosis.description: Investigate data quality issues from upstream source systems.
steps: Identify source systems producing invalid data

market_success_trend_analysis.description: Analyze success rate trends across different markets.

external_research.description: Search the web for external information about ETL pipelines or data engineering issues.

visualization_analysis.description: Generate visualizations such as charts and graphs for pipeline analytics.
steps: Return the visualization to the dashboard
